scorm12-violations.zip.description: SCORM 1.2 package with 13 distinct WCAG 2.2 AA violations seeded throughout index.html

scorm12-clean.zip.description: SCORM 1.2 package with zero violations. Valid manifest, proper semantic HTML, labels, focus styles, sufficient contrast.

scorm12-articulate-style.zip.description: SCORM 1.2 package mimicking Articulate Storyline output: multiple SCOs with deep organization tree, story.html entry point, story_content/ slide bundles, CSS files, and mobile/html5 alternatives. Includes missing alt text, low-contrast text, unsupported viewport user-scalable=no, and form inputs without labels.

scorm2004-captivate-style.zip.description: SCORM 2004 package mimicking Adobe Captivate HTML5 output: absolute-positioned slide layout, cp-* class prefix, dr/ runtime directory, legacy swfobject detection, and slide HTML files. Includes decorative images without alt text, div role=button without keyboard handlers, fixed-pixel containers, insufficient focus visible style, and form inputs without labels.

aicc-profile1.zip.description: AICC profile 1 package with 5 distinct WCAG 2.2 AA violations. Includes course.crs and course.au files plus index.html entry point.

scorm12-aria-dynamic.zip.description: SCORM 1.2 package with dynamic ARIA issues: focus order violations (positive tabindex), label inconsistency (Next vs Continue), and missing aria-live on status regions.

xapi-violations.zip.description: xAPI / Tin Can package with 4 launchable activities and static WCAG violations including missing alt text, keyboard support, target size, and form labels.

cmi5-violations.zip.description: cmi5 (xAPI profile) package with 2 launchable assignable units and static WCAG violations including missing alt text, input purpose, UI contrast, target size, and form labels.
